meaning: emergency medical technician 急诊医士
examples: If you want to take it a step further, you can get your EMT certification as well.
For some remote schools, EMT (mobile phone operator) allowed the use of its unused data channels.
Every contingency was thought of, even an ambulance and EMT unit were on hand just in case they were needed.
But he was also a trained EMT and came from a family of firefighters.
East Midlands Trains (EMT) said Network Rail engineers needed track access to carry out repair works.
